en: Sometimes it feels as if all the men I ever danced with are dead.
ko: 가끔, 내가 춤을 춘 모든 남자들이 죽은 것 같은 기분이 들어.

en: I just feel so useless, wasting my life while they sacrifice theirs.
ko: 그들이 자신의 삶을 희생하는 동안 내 삶을 낭비하고 있어.

en: You've been a tremendous help with the concert.
No, I don't mean selling programmes or finding prizes for the Tombola.
ko: 아니, 프로그램을 판매하거나 복권 상품을 찾는 게 아니라.

en: I want to do a real job, real work.
Well, if you're serious, what about being an auxiliary nurse?
ko: 그렇다면, 진지하다면 보조 간호사가 되는 건 어때?

en: There's a training college in York. I know I could get you onto a course.
It may be something of a rough awakening. Are you ready for that?
ko: 다소 힘든 각성이 될 수도 있어.

en: I mean, have you ever made your own bed, for example, or scrubbed a floor?
ko: 예를 들어, 네 침대를 직접 정리해본 적이 있니? 바닥을 닦아본 적은?

en: Mr Platt is taking a ladyship and Lady Grantham down to the village.
ko: 플랫 씨가 한 분과 그랜섬 부인을 마을로 데려가고 있어.

en: She wondered if you'd like to go with them. That's very kind. Thank you.
Go on. What else would I need? Well, if you're serious, what about cooking?
